name: Mast Milap
overview: After years of prioritizing her career over her love life, Priya embarks on an adventurous journey to find a life partner. Along the way, she meets many suitors with quirky, likeable and sometimes repelling characteristics.

trailers.title: MAST MILAP | TRAILER OUT NOW |  WEB SERIES | STARRING SHRADDHA DANAGAR | EXCLUSIVELY ON JOJO
